description_long: This street light features a tall, slender, dark-colored metal pole anchored to a square base, supporting two elongated lamp heads that extend outward in a V-shaped configuration. The lamp heads are rectangular with slightly rounded edges and appear to have a frosted or matte covering, likely to diffuse the light. The design is modern and utilitarian, with no visible decorative elements or ornamentation on the pole or lamp heads. The arms holding the lamp heads are angled symmetrically, providing wide illumination coverage to both sides. The base is robust and likely made of heavy metal or concrete to ensure stability in outdoor urban environments. The overall structure is functional, designed for efficient lighting of streets, sidewalks, or parking areas.
description: A modern, V-shaped street light with two elongated lamp heads on a tall, plain metal pole and a sturdy square base. The design is utilitarian, with frosted lamp covers and no decorative features.
description_view_0: Front view showing the V-shaped configuration of the two lamp heads extending symmetrically from the central pole.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the narrow profile of the lamp heads and the straight, slender pole with a square base.
description_view_2: Rear view, similar to the front, displaying the symmetrical V-shaped arms and lamp heads from the opposite side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile of the lamp heads and the unadorned pole.
attribute_lamp_head_design: Modern, elongated rectangular lamp heads with slightly rounded edges and frosted or matte diffusers, no decorative elements.
